creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/portmgr/charter/>: 

> … FreeBSD. The Ports Management Team (portmgr) is …

– then: 

> … The primary responsibility of the portmgr team is …

– that's like saying: 

    the Ports Management Team team 

Instead: 

> … The primary responsibility of portmgr is …

– or: 

> … The primary responsibility of the Team is …
